title: Orbital Review
description: Independent review of an agent's contribution by a dedicated reviewer agent.

contribution_id.description: ID of the contribution being reviewed

reviewer_function.description: Which reviewer agent produced this review

review_type.description: Whether this is a self-review or peer review

round.description: Which review round (1 = initial, 2+ = re-review after revision)

passed.description: Whether the contribution meets quality standards

issues.description: Specific problems found in the contribution

revisions_required.description: Specific changes the agent must make before the contribution passes
